title: Complete Search String
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"a5nkc","text":"This protocol describes the search strategy, Boolean operators, and inclusion and exclusion criteria used in the rapid systematic review entitled “Heavy Metal Contamination in North Africa Inland Aquatic Systems: A Rapid Systematic Review and Meta-Analytical Assessment of Sediment and Surface Water Quality, Ecotoxicological Thresholds, and Carcinogenic Risk.” The protocol provides a detailed and reproducible description of the methodology employed for literature identification, screening, selection, and data extraction. All methodological steps adopted throughout the review process are documented to ensure transparency, consistency, and reproducibility of the study.","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":147,"length":213}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Primary data were retrieved through a systematic search of the Scopus database, selected for its comprehensive indexing of environmental science literature and its structured export capabilities.
The search string combined controlled vocabularyand free-text terms as follows: ('heavy metals' OR 'trace metals') AND(wetlands OR lake OR chott) AND (Algeria OR Tunisia OR Morocco OR Egypt).
* Exclusion Articles published after 16 December 2025 * Inclusion Date : article published between 2004 and 2025 Language preference : English- and French-language articles
creator: Mouslim BARA
